structuredContent_sample.tree_markdown:
- Window "*tc_notepad.txt - Notepad"
    - [0] Document "Text editor" [value="RDHHtimecap rewind test file" actions=[set_value,text,scroll]]

            - Text "paths_finished.tsv"

          - TabItem "server-1.log. Unmodified."

            - Text "server.log"

            - Text "job-94acbc61-3106-455a-b3ed-b8c46859c967-logs.txt"

          - TabItem "run.log. Unmodified."
            - Text "run.log"
          - TabItem "run.log. Unmodified."
            - Text "run.log"
          - [2] TabItem "pyproject.toml. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [3] Text "pyproject.toml" [actions=[text]]
          - [4] TabItem "xpradotool.txt. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [5] Text "xpradotool.txt" [actions=[text]]
          - [6] TabItem "README.md. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [7] Text "README.md" [actions=[text]]
          - [8] TabItem "Untitled. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [9] Text "Untitled" [actions=[text]]
          - [10] TabItem "load-slack-gym.sh. Modified." [actions=[select]]
            - [11] Text "load-slack-gym.sh" [actions=[text]]
          - [12] TabItem "to collect traces we use computer-u. Modified." [actions=[select]]
            - [13] Text "to collect traces we use computer-u" [actions=[text]]
          - [14] TabItem "Dockerfile. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [15] Text "Dockerfile" [actions=[text]]
          - [16] TabItem "README.md. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [17] Text "README.md" [actions=[text]]
          - [18] TabItem "my updates. Modified." [actions=[select]]
            - [19] Text "my updates" [actions=[text]]
          - [20] TabItem "message_to_roycecy.txt. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]

          - [22] TabItem "nexus-api-gdm-ops-message.md. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]

          - [24] TabItem "executing the defer app launch to t. Modified." [actions=[select]]
            - [25] Text "executing the defer app launch to t" [actions=[text]]
          - [26] TabItem "orchestrator.log. Unmodified." [actions=[select]]
            - [27] Text "orchestrator.log" [actions=[text]]
          - [28] TabItem "tc_notepad.txt. Modified." [actions=[select]]
            - [29] Text "tc_notepad.txt" [actions=[text]]
        - [30] Button "Add New Tab" [id=AddButton actions=[invoke]]
        - [31] MenuItem "File" [id=File actions=[invoke,expand]]
        - [32] MenuItem "Edit" [id=Edit actions=[invoke,expand]]
        - [33] MenuItem "View" [id=View actions=[invoke,expand]]
      - [34] Button "Headings" [actions=[invoke,expand]]
      - [35] Button "Lists" [actions=[invoke,expand]]
      - [36] Button "Bold (Ctrl+B)" [actions=[toggle]]
      - [37] Button "Italic (Ctrl+I)" [actions=[toggle]]
      - [38] Button "Strikethrough (Ctrl+Shift+X)" [actions=[toggle]]
      - [39] Button "Link (Ctrl+K)" [actions=[toggle]]
      - [40] Button "Table" [actions=[invoke,expand]]
      - [41] Button "Clear formatting (Ctrl+Space)" [actions=[toggle]]
      - [42] Button "Writing tools" [id=RewriteDropDownButton actions=[invoke,expand]]
      - [43] Button "What's new" [id=FREButton actions=[invoke]]
      - [44] Button "User avatar" [id=AvatarButton actions=[invoke]]
      - [45] Button "Settings" [id=SettingsButton actions=[invoke]]
      - Pane "Local AI model must complete downloading to use this feature while signed out."
      - [46] Text "Line 2,
Column 1" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
      - [47] Text "29 characters" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
      - [48] Text "Plain text" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
      - [49] Text "Zoom" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
      - [50] Text " Unix (LF)" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
      - [51] Text " UTF-8" [id=ContentTextBlock actions=[text]]
  - TitleBar = "*tc_notepad.txt - Notepad"
    - MenuBar "System"
      - [52] MenuItem "System" [actions=[expand]]
    - [53] Button "Minimise" [actions=[invoke]]
    - [54] Button "Maximise" [actions=[invoke]]
    - [55] Button "Close" [actions=[invoke]]
